examples.title: Vector Operations
examples.description: Pseudocode for vector addition, scalar multiplication, dot product, and norm
examples.code:
FUNCTION addVectors(v1, v2)
 RETURN [v1[0] + v2[0], v1[1] + v2[1], ...]

FUNCTION scalarMultiply(v, c)
 RETURN [c * v[0], c * v[1], ...]

FUNCTION dotProduct(v1, v2)
 sum = 0
 FOR i FROM 0 TO length(v1) - 1
 sum = sum + v1[i] * v2[i]
 RETURN sum

FUNCTION norm(v)
 RETURN sqrt(dotProduct(v, v))
examples.explanation: These functions demonstrate basic vector operations.

examples.explanation: These functions use NumPy to perform matrix operations.
